cities.name: Cairo
cities.notes: Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum and Khan el-Khalili bazaar

cities.name: Luxor
cities.notes: Valley of the Kings, Karnak temple complex and hot air balloon sunrise

cities.name: Aswan
cities.notes: Philae temple, Nubian villages and Abu Simbel day trip by flight

cities.name: Alexandria
cities.notes: Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Pompey's Pillar and Mediterranean seafood

cities.name: Hurghada
cities.notes: Red Sea diving and snorkeling with dolphins and coral reefs

cities.name: Sharm el-Sheikh
cities.notes: World-class coral reefs at Ras Mohammed and Tiran island
